{{Quote|It's Slide Paramita, in his modified Pizor-Errol ''Stinger''. Very sharp.|[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fode Annodue]], a [[Troig/Legends|Troig]] race announcer, commenting on Paramita's Podracer|audio=Fode-SlideParamita.flac|<ref name="Star Wars Episode I: Racer">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]</ref>}}
The '''''Stinger'' 627 S''' was a sleek, swift [[Podracer/Legends|Podracer]] designed by [[Pizer-Errol]] and used by [[Slide Paramita]]. It was a small and fragile craft, but was very responsive on turns. Paramita's racer was also known for a very good repair and cooling system.

{{Veh-stub}}
